assetStatus: Original image URLs could not be downloaded from this execution environment because direct HTTP requests to scoliosiscarecenters.com and Playwright browser installation/downloads returned 403 Forbidden. The replacement page preserves original image roles and alt text as data-original-image attributes and uses lightweight local SVG placeholders that should be swapped for the original WordPress media files before production if asset access is available.
